title: planner: semi_join_rewrite hint should work for in-subquery
description:
## Enhancement
```
create table t1 (id varchar(64) not null,  key(id));
create table t2 (id bigint(20), k int);

explain delete from t1
  where t1.id in (select cast(id as char) from t2 where k=1);
```

Assume `t1` is a large table, then the best plan for the case above should be an Index Join on `t1`: 

```
+------------------------------------+----------+-----------+------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                                 | estRows  | task      | access object          | operator info                                                                                                   |
+------------------------------------+----------+-----------+------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Delete_8                           | N/A      | root      |                        | N/A                                                                                                             |
| └─IndexHashJoin_17                 | 8.00     | root      |                        | inner join, inner:IndexReader_14, outer key:Column#6, inner key:test.t1.id, equal cond:eq(Column#6, test.t1.id) |
|   ├─HashAgg_24(Build)              | 6.40     | root      |                        | group by:Column#6, funcs:firstrow(Column#6)->Column#6                                                           |
|   │ └─TableReader_32               | 8.00     | root      |                        | data:Projection_26                                                                                              |
|   │   └─Projection_26              | 8.00     | cop[tikv] |                        | cast(test.t2.id, var_string(20))->Column#6                                                                      |
|   │     └─Selection_31             | 8.00     | cop[tikv] |                        | eq(test.t2.k, 1), not(isnull(cast(test.t2.id, var_string(20))))                                                 |
|   │       └─TableFullScan_30       | 10000.00 | cop[tikv] | table:t2               | keep order:false, stats:pseudo                                                                                  |
|   └─IndexReader_14(Probe)          | 8.00     | root      |                        | index:IndexRangeScan_13                                                                                         |
|     └─IndexRangeScan_13            | 8.00     | cop[tikv] | table:t1, index:id(id) | range: decided by [eq(test.t1.id, Column#6)], keep order:false, stats:pseudo                                    |
+------------------------------------+----------+-----------+------------------------+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```

But now the semi-join rewrite (convert semi-join to inner-join) can't work for `in-subquery`, which lets us miss the opportunity to generate an IndexJoin, and below is the current plan generated by TiDB, which has a large full scan on the table `t1`:

```
+----------------------------------+----------+-----------+---------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| id                               | estRows  | task      | access object | operator info                                                              |
+----------------------------------+----------+-----------+---------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Delete_8                         | N/A      | root      |               | N/A                                                                        |
| └─HashJoin_12                    | 8000.00  | root      |               | semi join, equal:[eq(Column#6, Column#7)]                                  |
|   ├─TableReader_29(Build)        | 10.00    | root      |               | data:Projection_23                                                         |
|   │ └─Projection_23              | 10.00    | cop[tikv] |               | cast(test.t2.id, double BINARY)->Column#7                                  |
|   │   └─Selection_28             | 10.00    | cop[tikv] |               | eq(test.t2.k, 2)                                                           |
|   │     └─TableFullScan_27       | 10000.00 | cop[tikv] | table:t2      | keep order:false, stats:pseudo                                             |
|   └─TableReader_21(Probe)        | 10000.00 | root      |               | data:Projection_14                                                         |
|     └─Projection_14              | 10000.00 | cop[tikv] |               | test.t1.id, test.t1._tidb_rowid, cast(test.t1.id, double BINARY)->Column#6 |
|       └─TableFullScan_19         | 10000.00 | cop[tikv] | table:t1      | keep order:false, stats:pseudo                                             |
+----------------------------------+----------+-----------+---------------+----------------------------------------------------------------------------+
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, value INT, PRIMARY KEY(id));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id BIGINT, k INT, UNIQUE(id));
DELETE FROM t1 WHERE t1.id IN (SELECT CAST(id AS VARCHAR) FROM t2 WHERE k = 1);
